sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89811" key="prosoime/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσοιμέομαι</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οἶμος</etym>) <sense id="n89811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">approach</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βηλῷ</foreign> Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Erster Bericht</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2003.tlg001:p.9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.9</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Troketta</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
